Author: FFXIV Raid Planner
Name: XIV Raid Planner
Punchline: In-game loot priority overlay and auto-logging for FFXIV Raid Planner.
Description:
Displays loot priority rankings during savage raids and auto-logs loot drops to your FFXIV Raid Planner static. Requires an API key from the web app.

Commands:
/xrp - Toggle BiS gear viewer
/xrp priority - Toggle priority overlay
/xrp sync - Sync equipped gear to web app
/xrp config - Open configuration
Changelog:
v0.3.2 — BiS viewer polish

Fixed
- The Dalamud Open button now opens the BiS viewer to match /xrp.
- Plugin icon now renders in the installer (was a broken case-sensitive path).
- After sign-in, the Static and Tier dropdowns auto-populate instead of staying blank.
- Switching players in the BiS viewer no longer leaks the previous player's equipped column for a frame.

New
- BiS viewer auto-refreshes every time you open it.
- New Refresh button in the BiS viewer header.
- Party-member dropdown in the BiS viewer is now available to everyone (not just leads/owners), and works out-of-savage as soon as a roster is loaded.

v0.3.0 highlights still apply: browser sign-in, auto-detect your player, bare /xrp opens BiS, fixed shop highlighting, SDK 15 / .NET 9 refactor.
